result.markdown:
--- title: "AI Financial Analyst — Parte 3: News Engine" author: "Simone Boesso" date: "2026-05-26" categories: [ai-finance, python, news, sentiment] description: "Recuperiamo le ultime notizie sull'azienda e calcoliamo un sentiment aggregato." execute: warning: false --- ## Obiettivo Il News Engine recupera le ultime notizie relative a un'azienda e calcola un punteggio di sentiment aggregato da passare poi all'AI Analyst Layer. Il sentiment di mercato è spesso tanto importante quanto i numeri di bilancio. ## Scaricare le notizie con yfinance ::: {#4d1bfc15 .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import yfinance as yf import pandas as pd TICKER = "AAPL" ticker = yf.Ticker(TICKER) news = ticker.news df_raw = pd.DataFrame(news) df_news = pd.DataFrame([{ "title": item["content"].get("title", ""), "publisher": item["content"].get("provider", {}).get("displayName", ""), "date": pd.to_datetime(item["content"].get("pubDate", ""), utc=True) } for item in news]) df_news.head(10) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=1} ```{=html}
title publisher date
0 Why investors aren't loving Ferrari's new Luce EV Yahoo Finance Video 2026-05-26 14:22:49+00:00
1 Apple's AI strategy challenge might be solved ... Yahoo Finance 2026-05-26 16:04:42+00:00
2 Stocks to Watch: Ferrari, Dell, Marvell Techno... The Wall Street Journal 2026-05-26 20:20:35+00:00
3 RPG Investment Advisory Opens Centrus Energy S... Motley Fool 2026-05-26 20:19:37+00:00
4 Launch of Ferrari’s $640,000 EV Erupts Into a ... The Wall Street Journal 2026-05-26 20:00:00+00:00
5 AppLovin (APP) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why StockStory 2026-05-26 19:59:28+00:00
6 Bank of America resets Apple stock price targe... TheStreet 2026-05-26 19:13:00+00:00
7 Apple seen as key beneficiary of emerging agen... Proactive 2026-05-26 19:09:00+00:00
8 Ferrari reverses after controversial EV announ... TheStreet 2026-05-26 18:47:00+00:00
9 This Bullish Options Trade On Apple Stock Coul... Investor's Business Daily 2026-05-26 18:45:05+00:00
``` ::: ::: ## Analisi del sentiment Usiamo FinBERT, un modello pre-addestrato su testi finanziari che classifica ogni titolo come **positive**, **negative** o **neutral**. ::: {#c36d26e5 .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} from transformers import pipeline sentiment_pipeline = pipeline( "text-classification", model="ProsusAI/finbert" ) titoli = df_news["title"].tolist()[:10] risultati = sentiment_pipeline(titoli) df_sentiment = pd.DataFrame({ "titolo": titoli, "sentiment": [r["label"] for r in risultati], "score": [round(r["score"], 3) for r in risultati] }) df_sentiment ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=2} ```{=html}
titolo sentiment score
0 Why investors aren't loving Ferrari's new Luce EV neutral 0.753
1 Apple's AI strategy challenge might be solved ... neutral 0.748
2 Stocks to Watch: Ferrari, Dell, Marvell Techno... neutral 0.935
3 RPG Investment Advisory Opens Centrus Energy S... neutral 0.944
4 Launch of Ferrari’s $640,000 EV Erupts Into a ... negative 0.844
5 AppLovin (APP) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why neutral 0.822
6 Bank of America resets Apple stock price targe... neutral 0.573
7 Apple seen as key beneficiary of emerging agen... positive 0.731
8 Ferrari reverses after controversial EV announ... negative 0.854
9 This Bullish Options Trade On Apple Stock Coul... positive 0.923
``` ::: ::: ## Sentiment aggregato ::: {#ec1fbcf5 .cell execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} conteggio = df_sentiment["sentiment"].value_counts() print(conteggio) sentiment_map = {"positive": 1, "neutral": 0, "negative": -1} df_sentiment["score_numerico"] = df_sentiment["sentiment"].map(sentiment_map) score_medio = df_sentiment["score_numerico"].mean() print(f"\nSentiment aggregato per {TICKER}: {score_medio:.2f}") print("(da -1 = molto negativo a +1 = molto positivo)") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` sentiment neutral 6 negative 2 positive 2 Name: count, dtype: int64 Sentiment aggregato per AAPL: 0.00 (da -1 = molto negativo a +1 = molto positivo) ``` ::: ::: ## Interpretazione ::: {#ddb713c7 .cell execution_count=4} ``` {.python .cell-code} if score_medio > 0.3: interpretazione = "Sentiment positivo — notizie recenti prevalentemente favorevoli." elif score_medio < -0.3: interpretazione = "Sentiment negativo — notizie recenti prevalentemente sfavorevoli." else: interpretazione = "Sentiment neutro — notizie recenti miste." print(interpretazione) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Sentiment neutro — notizie recenti miste. ``` ::: ::: ## Salvare il contesto news ::: {#b0958c34 .cell execution_count=5} ``` {.python .cell-code} import os os.makedirs("data", exist_ok=True) df_sentiment.to_parquet(f"data/{TICKER}_sentiment.parquet") print("Sentiment salvato in data/") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Sentiment salvato in data/ ``` ::: ::: ## Prossimi passi Nel prossimo post combiniamo dati fondamentali, metriche e sentiment nell'AI Analyst Layer: un LLM che produce una valutazione strutturata con Quality Score, tesi di investimento e segnale finale.
